_note: The checklist of every official 5e spell, by book. Names and metadata only, no rules text: this is a list of facts, not expression. scripts/test-content-completeness.mjs asserts every entry here resolves in the content pack, so a spell that is absent fails the build by name instead of waiting for a player to report it. When a player names a spell that is not here, add it here first.
_shape: spells[] = { n: name, b: book, l: level, s: school, c: classes csv, a: [other names the same spell is printed under], missing: true while it still needs authoring }. Books: phb, xge, tce, ftd, scc, egw, bomt, ai.
